nl_query: What is the average number of annotations per frozen attempt?
failed_sql:
SELECT AVG(T2.count) AS avg_annotations_per_freeze
FROM evaluation_attempt AS T1
JOIN (
  SELECT attempt_id, COUNT(*) AS count
  FROM evaluation_annotation
  GROUP BY attempt_id
) AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.attempt_id
WHERE T1.status = 'FROZEN';
